center.name: Bruce Beehler
center.summary: Bruce Beehler是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Moluccan king parrot、黄额园丁鸟、Wattled smoky honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: left|thumb|At Brevard Zoo The Moluccan king parrot inhabits rainforests, but sometimes enters nearby plantations and gardens. Exceptionally, it occurs at altitude up to 2100 m, but more commonly below 1200 m (New Guinea){{cite book|author=Beehler, B., T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The first bird species found in New Guinea since 1939, the honeyeater was one of over twenty new species discovered by an international team of eleven scientists from Australia, Indonesia and the United States, led by an American ornithologist and Melanesia Conservation International vice-president Bruce Beehler

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: F7 thumb|left|200px In December 2005, an international team of eleven scientists from the United States, Australia and Indonesia led by Bruce Beehler traveled to the unexplored areas of Foja Mountains and took the first photographs of the bird.Lost World of New Species Found in Indonesia
